nodes.label: Dashboard
nodes.description: Main entry hub for the user interface.

nodes.label: Draws Page
nodes.description: Interface for managing lottery draw lifecycles.

nodes.label: Sales Page
nodes.description: Interface for ticket entry and real-time validation.

nodes.label: Offload Page
nodes.description: Interface for managing liability offloading to master dealers.

nodes.label: API Bridge
nodes.description: The pywebview JS-to-Python bridge. Orchestrates all backend calls.

nodes.label: Draw Service
nodes.description: Business logic for draw timing, status updates, and settlement triggers.

nodes.label: Agent Service
nodes.description: Manages agent hierarchies and commission logic.

nodes.label: Sale Service
nodes.description: Logic for parsing and persisting ticket sales.

nodes.label: Settlement Service
nodes.description: Core engine for payout calculations and revenue aggregation.

nodes.label: Draw Repository
nodes.description: SQL-based data access for draw records.

nodes.label: Agent Repository
nodes.description: SQL-based data access for agent records.

nodes.label: Connection Pool
nodes.description: Thread-safe connection manager for pywebview multi-threading.

nodes.label: Ticket Parser
nodes.description: Domain utility for parsing complex ticket input strings.
